download_verify_spam_hint: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.

er_payload_too_large: Recording is too large. Please try a shorter clip.

error_page_description_client: We had a problem loading this page. Try again in a moment or go back to the home page.
error_page_description_generic: We couldn't complete this step right now. Try again in a moment or contact the team.
home_download_description: We're finalising the installers for Mac, Windows and Linux. Leave your email on sign-up and we'll ping you the minute your platform is ready.
home_faq_1_answer: You can, and some people love it. But local models eat CPU and battery, require setup that never really ends, and deliver raw transcription. Shadow Whisper does the cleanup for you, on a laptop that stays cool.
home_faq_1_question: Why not just run a local Whisper model?
home_faq_2_answer: Same core loop: shortcut, speak, clean text at the cursor. Fewer enterprise features you'll never touch, a lighter monthly price, and no cap dressed as a "starter tier".
home_faq_2_question: How is this different from the expensive dictation apps?
home_faq_3_answer: Yes. Anywhere you can type, Shadow Whisper can drop text. Gmail, Slack, Notion, Word, VS Code, Cursor, a random form in the browser. It uses system-level input, not a browser extension.
home_faq_3_question: Does it really work in every app?
home_faq_4_answer: We don't store your audio or your transcripts on our servers. Recordings stay local on your device, and you can turn that off at any time. We only do lightweight post-processing on frequently mistranscribed keywords to improve future recognition, nothing that identifies you.
home_faq_5_answer: Yes. Cancel from the app, instantly. You keep Pro until the end of your billing period, then drop to the free plan. You don't lose your history.
home_faq_6_answer: We're in v0.1 preview. Mac, Windows and Linux builds are in the last mile. Sign up and you'll get the installer for your platform the moment it ships.
home_faq_7_answer: On the BYOK plan, you connect your own AI provider key. We encrypt it on the server to keep it safe, then use it for Wispr requests, AI-powered cleanup, and tool calls as well. In practice, you pay less for the platform and your AI cost stays directly proportional to how much you use it. It's a strong fit for lighter users who want to spend less and keep tighter control over usage.
home_faq_7_question: How does the Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) plan work?
home_faq_description: Honest, short answers to the things people actually ask about dictation tools.
home_faq_launch_answer: Mac, Windows and Linux installers ship in the next few weeks. Everyone on the waitlist gets the download link first, plus a personal discount coupon on Pro and a quiet founding-user badge inside the app. Use it on more than one OS? Submit the form again with the other platform — both entries get notified.
home_faq_launch_question: When does it launch — and what do I get for joining the waitlist?
home_feature_1_description: Pill goes Idle → Transcribing → back. The transcription lands in the notes window in a single paste.
home_feature_1_title: Speak. Text appears, at the cursor.
home_feature_2_description: Highlight rough text — the pill detects the selection, processes, and drops a refined version in its place.
home_feature_2_title: Select a mess. Get a clean sentence.
home_feature_3_description: See exactly what was refined in your text.
home_feature_4_description: Select a one-liner, the "Transform to email" skill expands it into a greeting, body and sign-off — pasted in place.
home_feature_4_title: Turn a sentence into an email.
home_feature_5_description: A saved snippet (e.g. "my affiliate link") expands mid-dictation into a full URL, signature or stock reply. No typing.
home_feature_5_title: Teach a phrase once — recall it for life.
home_final_cta_description: Free plan, generous weekly words. Pro trial, zero friction. Installers for Mac, Windows and Linux on the way.
home_final_cta_waitlist_description: Launching in weeks for Mac, Windows and Linux. Join the waitlist now — you'll get the installer first and a personal discount when Pro opens up.
home_hero_signal_1: Hit the shortcut, speak, keep working: no windows popping up.
home_hero_signal_2: No local model eating your battery. No GPU setup. No maintenance.
home_hero_signal_3: Cleaner output, lighter price than the loud names in the space.
home_hero_subcopy: Shadow Whisper is an AI dictation app. Hit one shortcut, say what you mean, and your words come out as a polished email, message, or note right where your cursor is.
home_hero_waitlist_kicker: Voice dictation · launching in weeks · waitlist open
home_hero_waitlist_signal_1: Launching in the next few weeks for Mac, Windows and Linux.
home_hero_waitlist_signal_2: Early supporters get a personal discount coupon and perks when we ship.
home_hero_waitlist_signal_3: No local model eating your battery. No GPU setup. No maintenance.
home_meta_description: Turn your voice into clean text in any app. AI dictation for Mac, Windows, Linux and a browser extension — the most affordable on the market. Join the waitlist.
home_meta_title: AI Voice-to-Text Dictation: Speak, Get Clean Text
home_pricing_description_prefix: Start on the free plan with 2,000 words per week. Upgrade when dictation becomes the way you write. Every Pro account includes a
home_pricing_plan_free_tag: For trying it, and for writers who dictate only when it really helps.
home_pricing_plan_pro_monthly_feature_2: Full AI rewrite and tone modes
home_pricing_plan_pro_monthly_tag: The everyday driver. Unlimited dictation, full AI rewrite, everything in the app.
home_pricing_plan_pro_yearly_tag: Two months free. For people who already know this will be part of how they work.
home_pricing_plan_standard_feature_2: Full AI rewrite and tone modes
home_pricing_plan_standard_tag: The everyday driver. Unlimited dictation, full AI rewrite, everything in the app.
home_pricing_plan_byok_feature_4: AI cost on your own account
home_pricing_plan_byok_tag: Use your own AI provider keys. Pay only for the platform.
home_pricing_title_prefix: Fair pricing for a tool you'll use every day.
home_pricing_waitlist_description_prefix: Start on the free plan with 2,000 words per week. Upgrade when dictation becomes the way you write.
home_pricing_waitlist_description_suffix: get a personal coupon toward Pro when we ship.
home_product_description: No busy dashboard. Just a recording pill that lives out of the way, a home screen for your usage, and a history you can search when you need to reuse a good sentence.
home_product_title_prefix: The whole product fits in one pill,
home_product_title_suffix: and a few quiet places you'll only visit when you want to.
home_steps_1_description: Works in the app you're already in: Gmail, Slack, Notion, VS Code, a form on a random site. One global hotkey, no context switch.
home_steps_2_description: Ramble, backtrack, think out loud. Our AI strips fillers, fixes punctuation, rewrites the rough edges, and keeps your voice.
home_steps_3_description: The finished sentence lands exactly where you were typing. No copy-paste dance, no extra tab to manage, no rhythm broken.
home_waitlist_description: Shadow Whisper is launching for Mac, Windows and Linux in the next few weeks — with a browser extension on the way. Pick your platform, drop your email, and we'll send the installer (or extension link) the moment it ships — with an early-supporter coupon that only goes to the waitlist.
home_waitlist_fine: Use it on more than one? Submit again with a different platform — both entries will get the installer.
home_waitlist_perk_1_description: Unique, tied to your email. Stacks on the yearly plan. You keep the price for as long as you stay subscribed.
home_waitlist_perk_2_description: The moment your platform ships, we send you the download link — before the public page goes live.
home_waitlist_perk_3_description: A quiet note inside the app thanking you, and early access to new modes before everyone else.
home_waitlist_success_message: We'll email you the moment the installer ships, along with a personal early-supporter coupon for Pro.
home_waitlist_title_suffix: Get a personal coupon when we ship.
home_why_audience_1_description: Your customer doesn't want a 3-minute voice note. Say what you mean and Shadow Whisper sends clean text in the right tone — close faster, without typing.
home_why_audience_2_description: That pile of emails stalling your day? Reply at the speed of speech: you talk, the AI cleans and formats. No more staring at the screen building sentences.
home_why_audience_3_description: Tendinitis, RSI, hands sore from too much typing — that's exactly why Shadow Whisper was built. Give your fingers a break: speak and the text appears, in any app.
home_why_audience_4_description: You've got the idea but freeze when it's time to write it "nicely". Say it out loud and Shadow Whisper rewrites it into a sharp line, ready to post.
home_why_audience_4_title: Post without staring at the cursor
home_why_description: The big names charge for screens you'll never open. The 'run-it-yourself' path costs CPU, battery, and a weekend you won't get back. Shadow Whisper hits the gap: the polish of paid tools, the honesty of open-source, and zero maintenance burden on you.
home_why_row_maintenance_cell_1: Something breaks every OS update. You are the support team.
home_why_row_maintenance_cell_2: Zero. It auto-updates and stays out of the way.
home_why_row_maintenance_cell_3: Stable, but entirely dependent on their uptime and roadmap.
home_why_row_output_quality_cell_1: Raw transcription with every "um" and half-finished thought attached.
home_why_row_output_quality_cell_2: AI cleanup by default: fillers out, punctuation in, tone matched.
home_why_row_output_quality_cell_3: Great, but you're paying a premium for features you never use.
home_why_row_price_cell_1: Looks free. Costs you CPU, battery, and a weekend of setup.
home_why_row_price_cell_2: Flat rate. Predictable, transparent — no tiers, no tricks. See pricing below.
home_why_row_price_cell_3: $12–$15/mo at the low end, climbing fast on annual plans.
home_why_row_setup_cell_1: Install models, dependencies, mic permissions, prompt templates.
home_why_row_setup_cell_2: Install, pick a shortcut, start dictating. That's the setup.
home_why_row_setup_cell_3: Account, workspace, onboarding screens before you even speak.
home_why_title_suffix: without the enterprise bill or the local-model headaches.

signup_affiliate_toggle_title: Have a coupon or affiliate code?

signup_benefit_habit_detail: A real opportunity to build the habit of speaking instead of typing.
signup_benefit_time_detail: 30 days unlocked once your sign-up is approved.
signup_feature_cleanup_desc: Fillers removed, punctuation corrected, tone preserved.
signup_feature_shortcut_desc: Works in Gmail, Slack, Notion, VS Code. Everywhere you type.
signup_feature_skill_desc: Turn a sentence into an email, summary, or rewrite with one click.

signup_page_title: Create your account and start dictating.

er_skill_not_official: Only official skills can be installed for voice invocation.
home_demo_subtitle: Press the shortcut or click record, then speak freely. Your words land in the transcript panel. Pick a Skill and hit Apply to see the rewrite in real time.
home_demo_record_hint_idle: Press the shortcut or tap the record pill to start recording.
home_demo_record_hint_recording: Press the record pill again to stop recording, or Cancel to discard this take.
home_demo_skills_label: Skill · how the AI rewrites your transcript
home_demo_apply_hint_empty: Record something first, then apply a skill to rewrite it.
home_demo_apply_hint_ready: Apply a skill to rewrite your transcript in place.
home_demo_transcript_placeholder: Press the shortcut or click record. Your transcript will appear here.
home_demo_language_hint: We'll tell Whisper what to expect.
home_demo_instr_step_2: Speak. Press the same shortcut again to stop, or Cancel to discard.
home_demo_instr_step_3: Pick a skill on the left, then hit Apply — your transcript gets rewritten in place.
home_demo_explainer_body: A skill is a tiny rewrite recipe layered on your raw transcript. In the real app, the rewritten output drops wherever your cursor is — no copy-paste, no popup. Build your own in the Skills hub.
home_demo_error_rate_limit: Slow down — demo limit hit, try in 60s.
home_demo_error_payload_too_large: Recording too long, try a shorter clip.
home_demo_error_skills_load: Couldn't load demo skills. Refresh the page.
home_demo_overlay_body: Record your voice, pick a skill, and watch your words get rewritten in real time — no sign-up needed.
